name: ai-skills-framework
description: A deterministic, TDD-oriented Laravel or Express TypeScript development lifecycle with adaptable frontend support.

interface.shortDescription: Structured Laravel and Express TypeScript delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: A Minic framework for SRS-driven planning, tracer-bullet tickets, test-driven implementation, deterministic verification, and contract-aware review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me choose and run the right AI Skills Framework workflow.
